title: ocimum fruticosum
intro: Ocimum fruticosum, also known as Fragrant Horsemint or Fingered Basil, is a perennial plant species in the mint family Lamiaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, antispasmodic, and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Ocimum fruticosum include relief from digestive issues, respiratory problems, and skin irritations. The plant can be used in various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and essential oils, to harness its medicinal properties and therapeutic benefits.
